source: generated by crates/boole-node/tests/testnet2_lean_invalid_fixture.rs (SC.10-iv-c): a v1-lenbound lean-bound share for a DISTINCT admission nonce (dddd..) from the honest iv-b fixture, with exactly one canon byte flipped (index 50, inside a POFP opaque-digest slot). seedHex is target_seed(c, pk, n, 0) so structural admission on a checker-off producer accepts it and self-produces a block carrying it, but bytes != the canon the seed commits to, so every checker-pinned node rejects the block at ingest re-verification (CanonMismatch -> DeterministicReject). The distinct nonce keeps its admission ticket separate from the honest control share on a loopback mesh. The test regenerates and pins this body, and prints the replacement on any checker/family/verifier change.
